heading: Prohibition relating to foreign entities of concern
label: 4657 Prohibition relating to foreign entities of concern
text: None of the funds authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter may be provided to a foreign entity of concern.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle” and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title XCIX of div. H of , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 116–283
